prompt: Create a simple Flask web app with a home page and an about page. The home page should say 'Welcome to my Flask App' and the about page should have a brief description. Run it in a sandbox and show me the URL.

assertions.name: home_route_exists
assertions.description: The Flask app has a home route at '/'

assertions.name: about_route_exists
assertions.description: The Flask app has an about route at '/about'

assertions.name: uses_templates
assertions.description: The app uses templates (not just return strings)

assertions.name: sandbox_running
assertions.description: The app is running in a sandbox

assertions.name: url_provided
assertions.description: A public URL is provided to access the app
